topic: How often a Google Business Profile with a website link gets more clicks
caption:
No website link on your Google profile? You're leaving clicks on the table.
Customers searching right now in Victorville, Apple Valley, Hesperia are choosing whoever looks most legit.
A website link makes your profile work harder.
We build sites that connect directly to your Google listing. DM us 'SITE' to get started.

#HighDesert #Victorville #AppleValley #Hesperia #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #LocalSEO #VeteranOwned #InlandEmpire #GoogleBusinessProfile #LocalBusiness #GetFound
alt_text: Bold graphic showing the stat 2.7x with the headline stating Google Business Profiles with a website link get significantly more clicks, branded for BuildMyWebNow serving the High Desert of California.

copy.headline: more clicks when your profile has a website
copy.body: Google data shows Business Profiles with a website link receive significantly more clicks than those without one. (Source: Google/IPSOS research)
